title: Create: Countries and Commerce
description: A Create focused modpack designed around creating countries with wars and an economy
body:
## Overview
**Create: Countries and Commerce**, or **CCC** for short, is a relatively lightweight modpack geared to simulating countries, war, and an economy in minecraft. It is primarily focused on the mod ***Create*** and some of its addons which all work together to allow the creation of factories, war machines, and other contraptions for use in an economy and war.

##
Another main component of the mod will be the mod ***Create: Aeronautics*** which will be added as soon as the mod is transitioned into open beta, this mod will allow the creation of numerous different flying, floating, diving, and driving contraptions which helps push players to create interconnected trade networks and war machines to fight over trade networks, resources, and land. 
##

## Purpose of **CCC**
The aim of **CCC** is to incentivize players to group into countries or factions and either make deals with, or fight against, other players and countries. This is accomplished through the use of mods that require specialization, such as ***Farmer's Delight***, ***Create***, ***Create: Big Cannons***, and ***Create: Aeronautics***. Some players will focus on certain mods as they each require a certain degree of time to master. This will lead to players specializing in specific mods while still wanting the benefits of other mods that they don't have the time, or resources to focus on. This specialization will lead to players trading with, or stealing from others in order to get access to the benefits of mods that they haven't tried out, or become experienced with. An example of this would be a player who is experienced with the mod ***Create*** could exchange a quarry device for good food with a player who has experience with ***Farmer's Delight***. Another scenario that could arise from the same matchup is the player experienced with ***Create*** could create some sort of war machine to attack the player experienced with ***Farmer's Delight*** and steal their food for themselves.


## Credits
